title: Darkerstory tooltips
description: Tooltips purple for minecraft 1.21.5 rpg style
body:
## DarkerStory Tooltips RPG
![tooltip rpg amethyst style](https://i.imgur.com/yIhhTZ2.png)
Tooptip rpg style

Darkerstory tooltips is a tooltips texturepack for minecraft vanilla, 1.21.4 +
This now use the new resource for change the tooltips instead of core shaders as before.
